strengthenedIdentity.signature: core-identity.md: updated Namespace Isolation section with deny-list and enforcement language
strengthenedIdentity.description: Strengthened namespace isolation in core-identity.md with explicit deny-list examples, concrete enforcement language, and optionally a build-agents validation check

denyListExplicitness.description: core-identity.md Namespace Isolation section must include at least 3 concrete examples of non-RAPID skills/agents that agents must NOT invoke

enforcementLanguage.description: The enforcement language must use imperative MUST/MUST NOT phrasing, not advisory SHOULD phrasing

definition.scope: Strengthen namespace isolation in core-identity.md with explicit deny-list examples for non-RAPID subagent invocation, imperative enforcement language, and optionally a build-agents validation check.

tasks.description: Strengthen core-identity.md Namespace Isolation section with deny-list and imperative enforcement
tasks.acceptance: Section includes 3+ concrete deny-list examples and MUST/MUST NOT language
